semantic_description: Verifies a scalar-only digit-sum routine for nonnegative input n. The function initializes sum to 0, then uses a while loop while n > 0 to add n % 10 into sum and replace n by n / 10. The intended return value is digit_sum_z of the original input. For n = 0 the loop is skipped and the function returns 0. The function does not read or write heap memory and preserves emp.
